home.heroTitle: Excellence in Dental Education & Patient Care
home.heroSubtitle: Rajarajeshwari Dental College and Hospital — A Centre of Academic Excellence, Research & Comprehensive Dental Healthcare

about.title: About RRDCH
about.subtitle: A premier institution blending academic excellence with compassionate patient care — shaping dental professionals since 2001.
about.missionText: To provide comprehensive, high-quality dental education that equips students with scientific knowledge, clinical competence and ethical values to serve society. To deliver excellence in patient care through evidence-based dentistry, cutting-edge technology and compassionate service to the community.
about.visionText: To be a globally recognised centre of excellence in dental education, research and oral health services. To nurture dental professionals who are compassionate leaders and global citizens committed to improving the oral health and overall well-being of communities worldwide.
about.valuesSub: The principles that guide everything we do
about.valExcellenceDesc: Pursuing the highest standards in dental education and patient care.
about.valCompassionDesc: Treating every patient with empathy, dignity and respect.
about.valInnovationDesc: Embracing evidence-based practices and cutting-edge research.
about.valIntegrityDesc: Maintaining the highest ethical standards in all we do.
about.milestonesSub: Our journey of growth and excellence

appointment.title: Clinical Appointment Booking
appointment.subtitle: Complete your clinical appointment booking in 4 professional steps.
appointment.step1Sub: Please provide accurate patient registration details.
appointment.step2Sub: Select the specific clinical department for your visit.
appointment.step3Sub: Choose your specialist and preferred time slot.
appointment.step4Sub: Please verify your appointment summary before confirming.
appointment.name: Full Name
appointment.confirmNotice: * By confirming, you agree to report to the registration desk 15 minutes prior to your time slot.
appointment.bookingIdSub: Save this ID to track your queue status later.

tracker.title: Track Appointment
tracker.subtitle: Verify your current booking status and find your position in the clinical queue.
tracker.label: Booking ID or Mobile Number
tracker.notFoundSub: Please verify your ID and try again.

statusMsg.booked: Important: Please check your SMS for a confirmation link. Your token will be generated once verified.
statusMsg.confirmed: Notice: Appointment verified. Please arrive 15 minutes prior to your time for primary screening.
statusMsg.completed: Your clinical visit has concluded. Please share your feedback to help us improve service quality.

feedback.title: Patient Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Your feedback helps us provide better dental care services.

hostel.subtitle: Report hostel maintenance or service issues for quick resolution.
hostel.head: Submit a Complaint
hostel.name: Your Name
hostel.successSub: Our maintenance team will review it shortly.

faculty.title: Faculty Directory
faculty.clinicalSpecialists: Clinical specialists listed by their respective departments
faculty.readyToLearn: Ready to learn from the best?
faculty.mentors: Our faculty members are mentors who guide you through every clinical challenge. Start your journey at RRDCH today.
faculty.principalQuote: "At Rajarajeshwari Dental College and Hospital, our strength lies in our exceptionally qualified faculty members. Each professor brings a wealth of clinical experience and academic rigour to ensure our students receive the finest dental education in the country."

queue.subtitle: Live tracking of OPD tokens and consultant availability across all clinical units.
queue.tokenSubtitle: Sequence of patients currently in line
queue.specialistSubtitle: Current availability of our clinical staff
queue.notice: This screen displays live estimates. Actual wait times may vary based on clinical complexity.

footer.descShort: A premier institution for dental education, research and comprehensive patient care since 2001.
footer.descLong: A premier dental institution committed to excellence in education, research, and patient care. Affiliated to Rajiv Gandhi University of Health Sciences, Karnataka.
